input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.7.3
            TITLE: vehicles using the practice area must have a complete inspection sticker

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.7.3: Vehicles using the practice area must have a complete Inspection Sticker
D.3.7.3 Vehicles using the practice area must have a complete Inspection Sticker

final_answer: Vehicles using the practice area must have a complete Inspection Sticker
